title: Star Wars: Armada Card Data Schemas
description: Schemas for extracting ship and squadron card data from card images. These map directly to the Godot Resource classes ShipData and SquadronData.

faction.description: Rebel cards have the Rebel Alliance starbird icon. Imperial cards have the Imperial crest.

ship_size.description: Small ships have a small base. Medium ships (e.g., Victory-class) have a medium base. Large ships have a large base.

dice_color.description: Colors of attack dice shown as colored symbols on the card.

defense_token.description: Defense token types shown as circular icons on the card. Evade=curved arrow, Redirect=angled arrows, Brace=angular bracket, Scatter=starburst, Contain=circle, Salvo=three arrows.

upgrade_slot.description: Upgrade slot icons shown in the upgrade bar at the bottom of the ship card.

dice_pool.description: A pool of dice expressed as count per color. Only include colors with count > 0.

yaw_row.description: Yaw values for one speed level. Index 0 = first joint (closest to ship), index 1 = second joint, etc. Each value is the max number of yaw 'clicks' (I or II) allowed at that joint. Use 0 if no yaw, 1 for one tick (I), 2 for two ticks (II). A '-' or empty on the card means 0.

ship_name.description: Full display name, e.g. 'CR90 Corvette A', 'Victory II-class Star Destroyer'

point_cost.description: Fleet point cost shown in the lower-right corner of the card.

hull.description: Hull value (large number, typically in the lower-center of the card).

command_value.description: Command value (number of command dials in command stack). Shown on the left stat column.

squadron_value.description: Squadron value (how many squadrons this ship can activate). Shown on the left stat column.

engineering_value.description: Engineering value (repair points). Shown on the left stat column.

max_speed.description: Maximum speed from the speed chart. The highest speed number shown.

shields.description: Shield values per hull zone, shown as blue numbers around the ship silhouette on the card.

battery_armament.description: Dice pool for each hull zone, shown as colored dice icons in each arc on the card.

anti_squadron_armament.description: Dice used when attacking squadrons, shown in a separate section on the card (usually near the hull zone arcs).

defense_tokens.description: List of defense token types. Include duplicates if the ship has multiple of the same type. E.g., ['EVADE', 'REDIRECT', 'REDIRECT'] means 1 evade + 2 redirects.

upgrade_slots.description: Upgrade slot icons shown in the upgrade bar at the bottom of the card, listed left to right.

navigation_chart.description: Speed chart / navigation chart. One entry per speed level (index 0 = speed 1, index 1 = speed 2, etc.). Each entry is a yaw_row array showing max yaw at each joint for that speed.

token_label_offsets.description: Pixel [x, y] offsets from PNG origin for label positions on the ship token image.

firing_arc_boundaries.description: Pixel coordinates defining the four arc boundary lines on the ship token. Each boundary separates two adjacent hull zones and is defined by an inner point and an outer point (on the token edge). All [x, y] pairs are measured from the PNG origin (top-left corner).

inner_point_front_left.description: Inner point of the FRONT/LEFT arc boundary

outer_point_front_left.description: Outer (edge) point of the FRONT/LEFT arc boundary

inner_point_front_right.description: Inner point of the FRONT/RIGHT arc boundary

outer_point_front_right.description: Outer (edge) point of the FRONT/RIGHT arc boundary

inner_point_rear_left.description: Inner point of the REAR/LEFT arc boundary

outer_point_rear_left.description: Outer (edge) point of the REAR/LEFT arc boundary

inner_point_rear_right.description: Inner point of the REAR/RIGHT arc boundary

outer_point_rear_right.description: Outer (edge) point of the REAR/RIGHT arc boundary

line_of_sight_origins.description: Each hull zone has one line-of-sight origin dot used to trace LOS to targets. Pixel [x, y] from PNG origin.

squadron_keyword.description: A keyword ability on a squadron card. Keywords with a numeric value (Counter X, Snipe X, etc.) include that value. The rules_text is the full game rule from the Rules Reference (not the reminder text on the card).

name.description: The keyword name exactly as listed in the Rules Reference.

value.description: Numeric value for keywords that have one (Counter X, Snipe X, Relay X, Adept X, Dodge X, AI X, Screen). Omit for keywords without a value (Bomber, Escort, etc.).

squadron_name.description: Full display name, e.g. 'X-wing Squadron', 'TIE Fighter Squadron'. Include 'Squadron' suffix for generic types.

point_cost.description: Fleet point cost per squadron, shown in the lower-right corner.

hull.description: Hull points, shown on the card.

anti_squadron_armament.description: Dice used when attacking other squadrons.

battery_armament.description: Dice used when attacking ships (shown separately from anti-squadron dice, often with a different icon section).

keywords.description: Keyword abilities as structured objects. Each keyword has a name and optional numeric value.

keyword_reminder_text.description: The reminder text printed on the card for each keyword, keyed by keyword name. This text is displayed to the player in-game. Extract verbatim from the card.

ability_text.description: Special ability text for unique squadrons, beyond their keywords. Empty string for generic squadrons.

is_unique.description: True if the card has a bullet (•) before the name, indicating a unique/named squadron.

defense_tokens.description: Defense tokens (usually only for unique squadrons). Empty array for generic squadrons.
